questionHtml:
Which level(s) of ecological complexity involve(s) biotic factors but not abiotic factors?

I. Community

II. Ecosystem

III. Population

A. I only

B. II only

C. I and II only

D. I and III only

meta.title: Which level(s) of ecological complexity involve(s) biotic factors but not abiotic factors? I. Community II. Ecosystem III. Population A. I only B. II only C. I and II only D. I and
